empty: Open a folder workspace to edit its settings.

website.description: How this workspace exports as a website. Saved to .glyph/site.json, so it travels with the folder.

title.label: Site title
title.hint: browser tab, header, and social cards

favicon.label: Favicon path
favicon.hint: workspace-relative; a root favicon.ico/png/svg is picked up automatically

socialImage.label: Social image path
socialImage.hint: shown in link previews; needs a base URL
